changes.value:
## What

Replace direct `setPanelStack` manipulation in `App.tsx` with `dispatch_command` calls. The command result contains the new `InspectorStack` — use it to update `panelStack`.

### Files
- `kanban-app/ui/src/App.tsx` — refactor `inspectEntity`, `dismissTopPanel`, `closeAll` to use dispatch_command

### Approach
- `inspectEntity(type, id)`: call `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'ui.inspect', target: '${type}:${id}' })`, read `InspectorStack` from result, update `panelStack`
- `dismissTopPanel()`: call `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'ui.inspector.close' })`, read result, update `panelStack`
- `closeAll()`: call `invoke('dispatch_command', { cmd: 'ui.inspector.close_all' })`, read result, update `panelStack`
- Remove the `useEffect` that calls `set_inspector_stack` — persistence is now server-side (Card 1)
- Keep `get_ui_context` restoration on mount (reads persisted stack)
- Helper: parse moniker strings from `InspectorStack` result into `PanelEntry[]`

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Opening inspector calls `dispatch_command('ui.inspect', ...)`
- [ ] Closing inspector calls `dispatch_command('ui.inspector.close')`
- [ ] Close-all calls `dispatch_command('ui.inspector.close_all')`
- [ ] `panelStack` driven by command results, not direct state manipulation
- [ ] `set_inspector_stack` invocation removed
- [ ] Inspector stack restores on mount/hot-reload
- [ ] No regressions: primary entity replaces stack, secondary pushes

## Tests
- [ ] Update existing inspector tests in `kanban-app/ui/src/components/entity-card.test.tsx` if they mock `onInspect`
- [ ] `npx vitest run` passes

## Subtasks
- [ ] Add helper to parse `InspectorStack` result into `PanelEntry[]`
- [ ] Refactor `inspectEntity` to use dispatch_command
- [ ] Refactor `dismissTopPanel` and `closeAll`
- [ ] Remove `set_inspector_stack` persistence effect

## depends_on
- Card 1: Backend persist + restore"
Frontend: route inspector operations through dispatch_command
